title: IIT Roorkee Jobs 2026 - Apply Online for Project Associate Posts
description: The Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Project Associate Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech and M.E./M. Tech can apply for the IIT Roorkee Jobs 2026. The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, selecti...
